questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition. In answering this question, you may wish to consider any horizontal overlap between Neoen and Alinta Energy with regard to the supply and generation of wholesale electricity, or vertical links between Jemena’s electricity distribution network and Alinta Energy’s retail supply of electricity, as well as Jemena’s gas distribution network and Alinta Energy’s retail supply of gas.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Sembcorp and/or Alinta Energy.
